description: This Kotlin source file defines the MainActivity class for an Android app demonstrating biometric authentication and session management. It manages user login, lock/unlock via biometric prompt, protected API calls, and UI updates, integrating with ViewModel and BiometricAuthenticator components.

classes.name: MainActivity
classes.description: Android activity managing biometric authentication, session states, and related UI for demo purposes.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes activity, sets up view bindings, click handlers, and starts observing auth state and log.

methods.name: onResume
methods.description: Handles activity resuming, optionally re-locks session and prompts for unlock.

methods.name: onDestroy
methods.description: Cancels observation job upon activity destruction.

methods.name: observeAuthState
methods.description: Collects auth state changes and updates UI accordingly.

methods.name: observeStatusLog
methods.description: Collects log lines and displays them in the UI.

methods.name: setButtonsEnabled
methods.description: Enables or disables UI buttons based on current state.

methods.name: maybePromptUnlock
methods.description: Prompts biometric authentication to unlock session if locked.
